about.title: About - Rush Mart
about.description: Learn about Rush Mart, Egypt's coffee and convenience brand.
about.heading: Built for people on the move.
about.body1: Rush Mart started with a simple idea: great coffee should not be hard to get. We set out to build a place where every cup is brewed fresh, every item on the shelf is exactly what you need, and the whole experience is fast enough to fit into any schedule.
about.body2: We are a convenience brand. That means we think about your morning commute, your late-night study session, and the moment between meetings when you just need something good. Our menu is straightforward, our prices are honest, and our doors are always open.
about.body3: Quality ingredients, trained baristas, and a commitment to consistency. That is what Rush Mart is built on.

careers.title: Careers - Rush Mart
careers.heading: We are growing.
careers.body: Rush Mart is expanding and we are always looking for people who take pride in their work. If you are interested in joining the team, send us a message at the address below.
careers.note: We will be in touch if there is a good fit.

contact.title: Contact - Rush Mart

contact.heading: We are here, always.
contact.body: Our store is open around the clock. Stop by any time, or reach out using the details below.
